title: SpacePlanV4
description: Output of the v4 space_planner. Per C.3 split: this schema no longer carries rooms[] or intra-floor adjacency_graph (both move to floor_plan). It carries the two skill bindings the space_planner owns (floor_layout per floor, connector_templates used building-wide) plus optional cross-floor connectivity, entry points, and per-floor role hints to coordinate the downstream floor_planners.

expanded_description.description: Mirror of the v4 expander/global_intent expanded_description for traceability.

items.description: ID of a skill with skill_category='floor_layout'. Index in array = floor index.

template_id.description: ID of a skill with skill_category='connector_template'.

vertical_connections.description: Cross-floor links (e.g. stairs). Empty/omitted for single-floor buildings. Convention: from_floor < to_floor.

entry_points.description: Where the building meets 'outside'. Replaces the v3 outside-vertex edge.

room_role_hints_per_floor.description: Optional per-floor hints (array index = floor index). Each inner array is a role multiset to guide the floor_planner. Empty inner arrays = no hint.
